rejected.reason: Signal fires on both Yes and No sides of same market when legendary traders are split (78% of markets). Paired signals contribute exactly 50% by construction. 7-30 day horizon below random baseline (42.9%). Signal adds no predictive value over market price as currently defined.
rejected.do_not_retry_without: Pre-registered STR-001b hypothesis with exclusive convergence filter (3+ on one side, <3 on other). quant-research-agent owns this. Oscar must approve hypothesis before backtest-agent retests.

Twitter/X still inaccessible.

scout_cycles.notes: Monday cycle (cycle 7). Weekly digest written. 3 net findings surfaced (SCI removed after history check revealed double-prior discard — process error: should check feedback.json BEFORE writing files). Key findings: (1) DeepSeek V4 local inference path — new angle not in prior sovereignty decision (Q2 GGUF 71GB potentially fits 96GB); (2) Polymarket info leakage 2020-2026 — empirical finding that regulatory_formal markets show near-zero leakage post-2024, relevant to RQ3.2 design; (3) Bayes-consistent orchestration ICML 2026 — backlog item for orchestrator Phase 3+ redesign. HuggingFace daily papers were low signal today (computer vision heavy). arXiv q-fin had strong batch of prediction market papers. Self-improvement note: must check feedback.json scout_cycles.discarded before filing any finding — two sources filed today were previously discarded.

scout_cycles.notes: Eighth scout cycle (Tuesday). Low-signal day: 1 finding from ~25 evaluated items. Single finding (2605.02286) has direct RQ3.2 implications — empirical validation that even confirmed Polymarket insiders show near-zero pre-event leakage in short windows, strengthening the 'elite signal = skill not insider access' theoretical basis. arXiv q-fin had 7 papers, 4 auto-discarded (sports, pure math, equity RL, equity portfolio). HuggingFace heavily computer-vision/robotics/medical today. Anthropic has no model or API changes. HN had no prediction market or quant finance items. Two companion papers from Nechepurenko (same author as ForesightFlow suite) appeared in q-fin today — filed one (2605.02286), discarded one as companion-extension (2605.02287). Karpathy autoresearch GitHub API error — second consecutive failure, will retry cycle 9.

Three new findings: (1) Prediction Arena (2604.07355) — first empirical data on AI trading live on Polymarket, 71.4% win rate for Grok-4, Polymarket CLOB dramatically outperforms Kalshi AMM for AI agents; (2) Kimi K2.6 — leading open-weight frontier model, 1T/32B MoE, US-hosted options exist, sovereignty question requires Oscar ruling before evaluation; (3) Grok 4.3 — xAI model at $2.50/MTok output (6x cheaper than Sonnet), watch list addition, no immediate action.
